title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 (Surface release) adds a native desktop application for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support for server connections, an enhanced web dashboard with admin controls, improved model picker with fuzzy search, and security enhancements. The release aims to make the agent platform more accessible across multiple surfaces and use cases.
